title: Moderation Update: April 29, 2026
body:
Today's moderation cycle addressed 3 high-severity reports:
1. User 'spam_wave_42' was banned for posting phishing links across 6 channels.
2. User 'toxic_runner' was banned for repeated targeted harassment of community newcomers.
3. A false positive mass report against core maintainer was closed after review.
Medium and low severity reports will be addressed in the next cycle. We remain committed to keeping our community safe and respectful for all members.
